pages.text: The $(item)Large Badlands Skyseed$() — red sand and terracotta. A towering, banded mesa rich in gold.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A towering mesa — a tall, eroded butte of banded terracotta rising high above its rim, with thick strata you can read down the cliff face.
$(bold)Gold country$()$(br)Badlands are the richest surface gold in the game, and this mesa carries it in quantity. Mesa, eroded, and wooded variants change the cap.
